examples: Her long, tapered fingernails pinch pieces of gauzy fabric at the underwear factory that is her ticket out of rural poverty.
Their gauzy skirts had brushed up from the grass innumerable flies and butterflies which remained caged in the transparent tissue as in an aviary.
There is a gauzy, ghostly quality to this painting.
Just as I opened my mouth to speak, the set seemed to fade into a gauzy haze.
In the gauzy light filtering through the canopy, the water, which was only a foot deep, looked crystalline.
